articles.title: Eid-ul-Fitr 2026 in India: Will it be March 20 or 21? Moon sighting timings explained
articles.description: Eid-ul-Fitr 2026 in India: Usually, India celebrates Eid a day after Saudi Arabia. But there have been exceptions, too. There have been rare occasions when both Saudi Arabia and India celebrated Eid on the same day. The date will be decided by moon sighting today.

articles.title: Firing at trader’s residence in M.P., ₹10 Crore threat issued; Bishnoi Gang named in post
articles.description: The incident took place on Monday (March 16) at Bhilgaon under Kasrawad police station limits, about 50 km from the district headquarters. Security has been deployed at the residence of the trader, Dilip Rathore, he said.

articles.title: Who is Indian national Kalpeshkumar Rasikbhai Patel on FBI's most wanted list and what is he accused of?
articles.description: Kalpeshkumar Rasikbhai Patel is considered a fugitive from justice, and any information regarding his whereabouts should be treated as significant and actionable, the FBI said.

articles.title: Quote of the Day: Tom Cruise on resilience — 'I don't care who you are, life has challenges'
articles.description: Hollywood star Tom Cruise’s words capture a universal reality: challenges are inevitable regardless of fame, wealth or success. His quote reflects resilience and the mindset needed to confront adversity.

dailyNews.title: Senate votes down effort to restrict Trump's Iran war powers

dailyNews.title: Rep. Jim McGovern says U.S. has been "strangling the island of Cuba for over six decades"
dailyNews.description: Power is being restored to Cuba after a total blackout hit the island earlier in the week. Democratic Rep. Jim McGovern of Massachusetts, who recently introduced a bill to repeal the embargo on Cuba, joins "The Takeout" with his perspective on the Trump administration's approach to the island nation.

dailyNews.title: Vice President Vance to meet with oil industry as White House plans more actions to address fuel prices
